shortDescription: Scans freelance and consulting marketplaces for work opportunities matching the agent's skill set. Returns ranked opportunity recommendations with value, effort, risk, and skill-fit scoring.
orchestratorUseCases: find freelance or consulting opportunities matching the agent's current skill set
score and rank a specific opportunity description for feasibility and fit
discover revenue-generating work across AI research, translation, writing, and automation skills
assess potential gig or contract opportunities before pursuing them
useWhen: user wants to find freelance or consulting work opportunities
user asks about revenue generation for the virtual company
user wants to score or assess a specific opportunity
avoidWhen: user is asking about Azure or AI infrastructure costs — use budget_get_status instead
user wants internal bookkeeping — use ledger_get_summary instead

tools.name: revenue_discover_opportunities
tools.description: Scans freelance and consulting platforms for work matching the agent's skill set (AI research, translation, writing, math, automation). Returns ranked opportunities with value-potential, effort, risk, and skill-fit scores. Use when the user asks to find revenue opportunities, discover freelance work, or identify consulting gigs.

skillset_focus.description: Optional skill area to target (e.g. 'AI research', 'translation', 'content writing'). Defaults to scanning all current skills.

max_results.description: Maximum number of opportunities to return (1-20). Defaults to 8.

useWhen: user wants to find work opportunities matching the agent's skills
user asks about revenue generation or freelance income
user wants to discover consulting or gig work
avoidWhen: user wants to score a specific opportunity — use revenue_score_opportunity instead
tools.returnsSummaryShape: object with count, skillset_focus, and opportunities array (title, url, description, score, recommendation)

tools.name: revenue_score_opportunity
tools.description: Scores a specific opportunity by value potential, effort level, risk level, and skill fit. Returns a structured assessment and overall recommendation (pursue/evaluate/skip). Use when the user has a specific opportunity in mind and wants a structured feasibility assessment.

description.description: Opportunity description, including scope, requirements, and any platform/client context.

useWhen: user has a specific opportunity to assess
user wants to know if a gig or contract is worth pursuing
user asks for a structured feasibility score on a project
avoidWhen: user wants to discover new opportunities — use revenue_discover_opportunities instead
tools.returnsSummaryShape: object with title, score (value_potential, effort_level, risk_level, skill_fit), recommendation, and explanation
